sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32037" key="e)kqolo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκθολόω</orth>, <sense id="n32037.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make turbid,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:183" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">183</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
